text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
The Fan Fest is a celebration held for
Umamusume fans.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
And T.M. Opera O has prepared<n>something special
just for it...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Musical theater, naturally! An<n>operetta, in case you
were still in the<n>dark!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
I have assembled an all-star cast<n>from my
generation to announce our<n>presence to the world!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
The star playing the role of King is no<n>other than...
me, of course!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
And the king's right-hand servant,<n>Knight A, shall
be played by... Meisho<n>Doto!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: I-I'll... uh... try really hard!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Um... I'm happy to play the role of<n>your friend...
but...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: What I really wanted to do was...<n>Aaah—

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
And my next subordinate in the role<n>of Knight B
is...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Admire Vega, aka Ayabe! Last time<n>we saw each
other was during the<n>Classics, no?

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
I... took time off because I had no<n>choice. I still
haven't recovered...

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
I wonder if this is okay—acting in a<n>play when I
can't race.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Your character, Ayabe, is a knight<n>who turns on
me and beats me to a<n>pulp.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Well then... count me in.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: And so, the curtain rises on the trio's<n>opera!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Indeed! So long as I am here with you<n>two by my
side, the future of this<n>kingdom remains bright!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
We will sweep away the older<n>generation's
umbral shadow that<n>hangs over the lands!

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: We will sweep it away...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
The older generation's shadow... But<n>that means
Grass Wonder and them...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: I-I don't know about this... I... Ohhhh...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Now, Ayabe, this is the scene where<n>you commit
your betrayal.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Declare your conviction on high and<n>become my
enemy.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Okay, here I go...

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, how naive, Opera O—not to<n>notice the snake
in your own court...

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
Your true foe isn't the previous<n>generation. Your
true foe is...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: MEEEEE!

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Huh? Doto?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Hm? That was not in the script. HasDoto turned this into... operaimprov?!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: The unexpected twist stuns even<n>Opera O.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
For... for a long time now, I've<n>wanted... to face off
against you!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
I couldn't accept your offer at first...<n>So the role I
wanted was passed to<n>Ayabe.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
It tore me up inside... Even if for just<n>a moment, I
wanted you... to see me!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
I've trained a lot. I've been in lots of<n>races. Now...
I'm so close to G1!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: I might not make it to the spring<n>Tenno Sho, but...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: I can definitely make it to the<n>Takarazuka Kinen!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
I want to run with you, Opera O! But<n>this time, as
your opponent!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: So... race me! PRETTY PLEASE!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Doto, I never...

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Doto is really showing her heart,<n>unspoken
feelings now bursting free.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Oooh, tell me it isn't true! Doto, whom<n>I'd believed
to be my friend, is a<n>conniving traitor!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
What has become of our ironclad<n>kinship?!
Doomed. Our generation is<n>utterly doomed.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Before our battle against the older<n>generation
could commence, our<n>consortium has degraded
into chaos<n>and disarray!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Hyeeeee! Opera O, I'm sorry! I... I<n>just...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Woe is me... Wait, could it be?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Hehehe... Destiny has shown its<n>cards. This is the
curse of the royal<n>blood that runs through my
veins!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Do your worst, Doto! I, T.M. Opera O,<n>shall neither
flee nor hide!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Haaah ha ha! Go forth and spark the<n>civil war that
will rend our nation in<n>two!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Huuuh?! Are you happy or angry? I<n>can't tell!

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
I wouldn't worry too much. This one<n>lives for
drama.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Doto... I'm rooting for you.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Thanks, Ayabe...

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Your effort... isn't in vain.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
I mean... you just got me out of this.<n>Heh, I pass
the baton to you.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: O-okay...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Now that you have made your<n>declaration, there is
no turning back.<n>You have become my enemy!

A rift runs through this generation of<n>ours... And it
grows larger by the<n>minute.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
You must face me now, before the<n>showdown
against our predecessors<n>can take place!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: O-okay! Let's do this, Opera Ooo!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
The new turn of events greatly<n>increases the
excitement in the<n>audience.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Before Opera O can challenge the<n>generation
before her, she must settle<n>the disarray now
plaguing her own.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: Murmur, murmur...

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Some discourse has begun brewing<n>in the stands,
though.

text_block_list.name: Fan A
text_block_list.text:
Hey, I don't think they're acting. Like,<n>that was a
real fight, wasn't it?

text_block_list.name: Fan B
text_block_list.text:
No way! Who'd pick a fight with Ope<n>when she's
so popular? Won't all<n>her fans be ticked off?

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Huh... S-so many people are looking<n>at me... But
why? Urghh...

Fans start glaring down at Meisho<n>Doto once they
realize she wasn't<n>acting.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
The number of die-hard T.M. Opera O<n>fans has
grown a lot recently. And<n>now they've found a
target.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Aaagh... I'm sorry... R-really...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
If I was too out of line, then we can...<n>go back to
the way it was.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Do not stand down, Doto!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: O-Opera O?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
You took the stage of your own<n>volition, so you
mustn't!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
You must not retreat! Maintain your<n>courage! Step
onto the stage in this<n>momentous occasion as the
knight<n>you are!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: And a message to my fans—how<n>pathetic!
A fiery Opera O tears into the<n>audience.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
An enemy she may be, but she<n>deserves your
love. If you were my<n>fans, then you would open
your<n>hearts to be as unprejudiced as<n>mine.

Besides! A work of theater without<n>twists and
surprises is the very<n>definition of boring!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Yes, Meisho Doto is both my friend<n>and my foe...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
As with the older racers who stand in<n>my way, I
wish for you to accept her<n>as a part of this tale!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Hear me well! Send your best wishes<n>to the full
cast of this wonderful age!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: Wooooooo!

text_block_list.name: Fan C
text_block_list.text: That was awesome, Opera O!
Spoken like a true star!
Opera O...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Doto, there is no taking back the<n>words you
gallantly declared.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
You must face me now, before the<n>showdown
against our predecessors<n>can take place!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: O-okay! Let's do this, Opera Ooo!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
With the air of a true king, T.M. Opera<n>O brings the
play to a close.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
She has also gained a new and<n>important mission
with today's<n>surprise—to settle competition among
her own generation before taking on<n>the old.
